## 修改内容
## Changes

说明本次修改解决的问题和范围。

Describe the problem addressed and the scope of this change.

## 验证
## Validation

列出已运行的检查和结果。

List the checks run and their results.

## 双语与隐私检查
## Bilingual and Privacy Check

确认新增文档严格中英段落对应，且不包含隐私、密钥或未授权材料。

Confirm that new documentation uses strictly corresponding Chinese-English paragraphs and contains no private data, secrets, or unauthorized material.
